title: Discover and inspect data packages
text: glc_packages() returns one row per registered repository. useful fields distinguish repository’s current revision recent passing revision: current_status current_commit describe configured current revision; latest_pass_commit has_latest_pass identify last validated revision available reproducible use; attestation_verified reports whether registry attestation verified. Registry results cached R session. Set refresh = TRUE need fetch registry . Searches fixed case-insensitive default:
code: packages <- glc_packages() packages[, c(   "id", "repository", "current_status", "has_latest_pass",   "attestation_verified" )] #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> # A tibble: 2 × 5 #>   id              repository current_status has_latest_pass attestation_verified #>   <chr>           <chr>      <chr>          <lgl>           <lgl>                #> 1 guidolin-glee-… tscnlab/g… pass           TRUE            TRUE                 #> 2 demo-glee-data… tscnlab/d… fail           FALSE           TRUE packages <- glc_packages(refresh = TRUE) glc_search_packages("guidolin", packages) #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> # A tibble: 1 × 17 #>   id           repository branch repository_status current_status current_commit #>   <chr>        <chr>      <chr>  <chr>             <chr>          <chr>          #> 1 guidolin-gl… tscnlab/g… main   active            pass           8ec9034a3d967… #> # ℹ 11 more variables: current_validator <chr>, current_validated_at <chr>, #> #   current_errors <int>, current_warnings <int>, latest_pass_commit <chr>, #> #   latest_pass_validator <chr>, latest_pass_validated_at <chr>, #> #   has_latest_pass <lgl>, is_current_pass <lgl>, attestation_verified <lgl>, #> #   registry_generated_at <chr> glc_search_packages(packages = packages, status = c("pass", "fail")) #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> # A tibble: 2 × 17 #>   id           repository branch repository_status current_status current_commit #>   <chr>        <chr>      <chr>  <chr>             <chr>          <chr>          #> 1 guidolin-gl… tscnlab/g… main   active            pass           8ec9034a3d967… #> 2 demo-glee-d… tscnlab/d… main   active            fail           6f805a86164f2… #> # ℹ 11 more variables: current_validator <chr>, current_validated_at <chr>, #> #   current_errors <int>, current_warnings <int>, latest_pass_commit <chr>, #> #   latest_pass_validator <chr>, latest_pass_validated_at <chr>, #> #   has_latest_pass <lgl>, is_current_pass <lgl>, attestation_verified <lgl>, #> #   registry_generated_at <chr> glc_search_packages(packages = packages, has_pass = FALSE) #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> # A tibble: 1 × 17 #>   id           repository branch repository_status current_status current_commit #>   <chr>        <chr>      <chr>  <chr>             <chr>          <chr>          #> 1 demo-glee-d… tscnlab/d… main   active            fail           6f805a86164f2… #> # ℹ 11 more variables: current_validator <chr>, current_validated_at <chr>, #> #   current_errors <int>, current_warnings <int>, latest_pass_commit <chr>, #> #   latest_pass_validator <chr>, latest_pass_validated_at <chr>, #> #   has_latest_pass <lgl>, is_current_pass <lgl>, attestation_verified <lgl>, #> #   registry_generated_at <chr>

title: Discover and inspect data packages
text: Opening registered package default ref = "latest_pass" selects exact passing commit, moving branch: Use ref = "current" explicitly need registry’s current revision. revision passing, glcdp warns. can also provide exact 40-character commit SHA; commits selected registry record marked unverified. private repositories, pass token directly define GITHUB_PAT GITHUB_TOKEN. put tokens scripts, vignettes, package options.
code: x <- glc_open("tscnlab/guidolin-glee-datasetv2") x #> <GLC data package> #> Source: tscnlab/guidolin-glee-datasetv2@8ec9034a3d96 #> Schema: 2.0.0 #> Registry revision: verified current <- glc_open(   "tscnlab/guidolin-glee-datasetv2",   ref = "current" ) current #> <GLC data package> #> Source: tscnlab/guidolin-glee-datasetv2@8ec9034a3d96 #> Schema: 2.0.0 #> Registry revision: verified  registry_row <- glc_search_packages("guidolin", packages) registry_row$repository[[1]] #> [1] "tscnlab/guidolin-glee-datasetv2" registry_row$latest_pass_commit[[1]] #> [1] "8ec9034a3d967580cb8c1b04e629cbbe7e502e6e"  pinned <- glc_open(   registry_row$repository[[1]],   ref = registry_row$latest_pass_commit[[1]] ) pinned #> <GLC data package> #> Source: tscnlab/guidolin-glee-datasetv2@8ec9034a3d96 #> Schema: 2.0.0 #> Registry revision: verified

title: Discover and inspect data packages
text: glc_summary() reports schema version counts studies, datasets, participants, devices, file groups, files, variables. also summarizes modalities, time zones, primary variables.
code: glc_summary(x) #> <GLC package summary> #> Schema: 2.0.0 #> Studies: 1 | Datasets: 2 | Participants: 3 #> File groups: 2 | Files: 2 | Variables: 35

title: Discover and inspect data packages
text: inventories tibbles, can printed, filtered, joined using ordinary data-frame tools. glc_datasets() describes logical datasets associations. dataset id, reuse narrow inventories. File inventories expose declared resolved paths, format, encoding, time zone, role, data state, device, storage type, expected size, availability. Git LFS-backed files identified without requiring local Git LFS installation. Variable inventories can narrowed dataset, file group, semantic term, primary status: Use source variable names variables argument glc_read() semantic terms terms argument.
code: glc_resources(x) #> # A tibble: 7 × 10 #>   resource path  core  directory format media_type profile schema_path delimiter #>   <chr>    <chr> <lgl> <lgl>     <chr>  <chr>      <chr>   <chr>       <chr>     #> 1 study    data… TRUE  FALSE     NA     applicati… schema… schemas/2.… NA        #> 2 partici… data… TRUE  FALSE     json   applicati… tabula… schemas/2.… NA        #> 3 partici… data… TRUE  FALSE     csv    text/csv   tabula… schemas/2.… NA        #> 4 datasets data… TRUE  FALSE     NA     applicati… schema… schemas/2.… NA        #> 5 devices  data… TRUE  FALSE     NA     applicati… schema… schemas/2.… NA        #> 6 device_… data… TRUE  TRUE      NA     applicati… schema… schemas/2.… NA        #> 7 light_d… data… FALSE FALSE     csv    text/csv   tabula… schemas/li… ;         #> # ℹ 1 more variable: decimal_mark <chr> glc_datasets(x) #> # A tibble: 2 × 13 #>   dataset_id schema_version study_id participant_id participant_associated #>   <chr>      <chr>          <chr>    <chr>          <lgl>                  #> 1 DS001      2.0.0          CG2024   201            TRUE                   #> 2 DS002      2.0.0          CG2024   P001           TRUE                   #> # ℹ 8 more variables: timezone <chr>, latitude <dbl>, longitude <dbl>, #> #   file_group_count <int>, file_count <int>, modalities <list>, #> #   device_ids <list>, primary_variables <list>  glc_files(x, dataset_id = "DS001") #> # A tibble: 1 × 19 #>   dataset_id file_group file_group_id participant_id study_id path               #>   <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr>          <chr>    <chr>              #> 1 DS001               1 DS001:1       201            CG2024   data/datasets/201… #> # ℹ 13 more variables: declared_path <chr>, format <chr>, encoding <chr>, #> #   timezone <chr>, role <chr>, data_state <chr>, modalities <list>, #> #   device_id <chr>, storage <chr>, expected_bytes <dbl>, lfs_oid <chr>, #> #   blob_sha <chr>, available <lgl> glc_files(   x,   dataset_id = "DS001",   modality = "light",   available = TRUE ) #> # A tibble: 1 × 19 #>   dataset_id file_group file_group_id participant_id study_id path               #>   <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr>          <chr>    <chr>              #> 1 DS001               1 DS001:1       201            CG2024   data/datasets/201… #> # ℹ 13 more variables: declared_path <chr>, format <chr>, encoding <chr>, #> #   timezone <chr>, role <chr>, data_state <chr>, modalities <list>, #> #   device_id <chr>, storage <chr>, expected_bytes <dbl>, lfs_oid <chr>, #> #   blob_sha <chr>, available <lgl> glc_variables(x, dataset_id = "DS001") #> # A tibble: 33 × 13 #>    dataset_id file_group file_group_id name    label unit  type  term  term_name #>    <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr>   <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>     #>  1 DS001               1 DS001:1       DATE/T… Time… N/A   guess other DATE/TIME #>  2 DS001               1 DS001:1       MS      Unkn… Unkn… guess other MS        #>  3 DS001               1 DS001:1       EVENT   Occu… 0 or… guess other EVENT     #>  4 DS001               1 DS001:1       TEMPER… Skin… °C    guess other TEMPERAT… #>  5 DS001               1 DS001:1       EXT TE… envi… °C    guess other EXT. TEM… #>  6 DS001               1 DS001:1       ORIENT… Unkn… Unkn… guess other ORIENTAT… #>  7 DS001               1 DS001:1       PIM     Acce… Unkn… guess other PIM       #>  8 DS001               1 DS001:1       TAT     Acce… Unkn… guess other TAT       #>  9 DS001               1 DS001:1       ZCM     Acce… Unkn… guess other ZCM       #> 10 DS001               1 DS001:1       PIMn    Norm… Unkn… guess other PIMn      #> # ℹ 23 more rows #> # ℹ 4 more variables: calibration <chr>, primary <lgl>, factor_values <list>, #> #   factor_labels <list> glc_variables(x, dataset_id = "DS001", primary = TRUE) #> # A tibble: 1 × 13 #>   dataset_id file_group file_group_id name  label    unit  type  term  term_name #>   <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr> <chr>    <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>     #> 1 DS001               1 DS001:1       LIGHT Photopi… lx    guess phot… NA        #> # ℹ 4 more variables: calibration <chr>, primary <lgl>, factor_values <list>, #> #   factor_labels <list> glc_variables(x, term = "photopic illuminance") #> # A tibble: 2 × 13 #>   dataset_id file_group file_group_id name  label    unit  type  term  term_name #>   <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr> <chr>    <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>     #> 1 DS001               1 DS001:1       LIGHT Photopi… lx    guess phot… NA        #> 2 DS002               1 DS002:1       lux   Photopi… lux   guess phot… NA        #> # ℹ 4 more variables: calibration <chr>, primary <lgl>, factor_values <list>, #> #   factor_labels <list>

title: Discover and inspect data packages
text: resources argument, glc_metadata() loads core resources package declares. Requesting resources explicitly often faster makes dependencies clearer. JSON objects remain lists, tabular resources become tibbles, directory resources become named lists keyed package-relative path. Search traverses nested metadata reports resource, record, complete field path, value, context match:
code: metadata <- glc_metadata(x, resources = c("study", "participants")) names(metadata) #> [1] "study"        "participants" metadata$study #> # A tibble: 1 × 14 #>   study_internal_id study_title study_ethics study_short_descript…¹ study_sample #>   <chr>             <chr>       <chr>        <chr>                  <chr>        #> 1 CG2024            Near-corne… Ethics Comm… In this study, we mea… Participant… #> # ℹ abbreviated name: ¹​study_short_description #> # ℹ 9 more variables: study_groups <list>, study_setting <chr>, #> #   study_geographical_location <chr>, study_datasets <list>, study_type <chr>, #> #   study_funding_sources <list>, study_keywords <list>, #> #   study_contributors <list>, schema_version <chr> metadata$participants #> # A tibble: 3 × 4 #>   participant_internal_id participant_age participant_sex participant_gender #>   <chr>                             <int> <chr>           <chr>              #> 1 201                                  29 male            ""                 #> 2 P001                                 34 female          ""                 #> 3 P003                                 22 other           NA glc_search_metadata(x, "light exposure") #> # A tibble: 2 × 5 #>   resource record field                   value                          context #>   <chr>     <int> <chr>                   <chr>                          <chr>   #> 1 study         1 study_title             Near-corneal plane light expo… record… #> 2 study         1 study_short_description In this study, we measured li… record…  glc_search_metadata(   x,   "age|chronotype",   resources = "participant_characteristics",   fixed = FALSE ) #> # A tibble: 1 × 5 #>   resource                    record field                         value context #>   <chr>                        <int> <chr>                         <chr> <chr>   #> 1 participant_characteristics      1 participant_characteristic_n… Chro… record…  city_fields <- glc_search_metadata(   x,   "city",   resources = "study",   search_in = "fields" ) unique(city_fields$field) #> [1] "study_contributors.contributor_institution.contributor_institution_city"  glc_search_metadata(   x,   "Munich",   resources = "study",   fields = "contributor_institution_city" ) #> # A tibble: 3 × 5 #>   resource record field                                            value context #>   <chr>     <int> <chr>                                            <chr> <chr>   #> 1 study         1 study_contributors.contributor_institution.cont… Muni… record… #> 2 study         1 study_contributors.contributor_institution.cont… Tueb… record… #> 3 study         1 study_contributors.contributor_institution.cont… Tueb… record…

title: Discover and inspect data packages
text: Local packages use public interface, makes useful development, validation follow-, offline analysis: directory must contain datapackage.json descriptor paths needed selected operation. subset created glc_download() can reopened exactly way. selecting collecting compatible light data, use LightLogR function reference downstream quality checks, summaries, metrics, visualizations.
code: x_local <- glc_open("path/to/package", quiet = TRUE) glc_summary(x_local) glc_files(x_local, available = FALSE)

title: Get started with glcdp
text: Install development version GitHub attach package: glcdp currently understands following GLC schemas:
code: pak::pak("tscnlab/glc-dp-r") library(glcdp) library(glcdp) glc_schema_versions() #> # A tibble: 3 × 3 #>   version status       notes                                               #>   <chr>   <chr>        <chr>                                               #> 1 1.0.0   stable       Legacy packages may omit the root schema version.   #> 2 2.0.0   stable       Current released schema supported by the validator. #> 3 3.0.0   experimental Follows the schema-3.0.0-development branch.

title: Get started with glcdp
text: registry includes passing non-passing current revisions. Keeping visible makes validation status explicit instead silently hiding packages problems. can also filter validation status whether package recorded passing revision:
code: packages <- glc_packages() packages #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> # A tibble: 2 × 17 #>   id           repository branch repository_status current_status current_commit #>   <chr>        <chr>      <chr>  <chr>             <chr>          <chr>          #> 1 guidolin-gl… tscnlab/g… main   active            pass           8ec9034a3d967… #> 2 demo-glee-d… tscnlab/d… main   active            fail           6f805a86164f2… #> # ℹ 11 more variables: current_validator <chr>, current_validated_at <chr>, #> #   current_errors <int>, current_warnings <int>, latest_pass_commit <chr>, #> #   latest_pass_validator <chr>, latest_pass_validated_at <chr>, #> #   has_latest_pass <lgl>, is_current_pass <lgl>, attestation_verified <lgl>, #> #   registry_generated_at <chr>  glc_search_packages("guidolin", packages) #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> # A tibble: 1 × 17 #>   id           repository branch repository_status current_status current_commit #>   <chr>        <chr>      <chr>  <chr>             <chr>          <chr>          #> 1 guidolin-gl… tscnlab/g… main   active            pass           8ec9034a3d967… #> # ℹ 11 more variables: current_validator <chr>, current_validated_at <chr>, #> #   current_errors <int>, current_warnings <int>, latest_pass_commit <chr>, #> #   latest_pass_validator <chr>, latest_pass_validated_at <chr>, #> #   has_latest_pass <lgl>, is_current_pass <lgl>, attestation_verified <lgl>, #> #   registry_generated_at <chr> glc_search_packages(packages = packages, status = "pass") #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> # A tibble: 1 × 17 #>   id           repository branch repository_status current_status current_commit #>   <chr>        <chr>      <chr>  <chr>             <chr>          <chr>          #> 1 guidolin-gl… tscnlab/g… main   active            pass           8ec9034a3d967… #> # ℹ 11 more variables: current_validator <chr>, current_validated_at <chr>, #> #   current_errors <int>, current_warnings <int>, latest_pass_commit <chr>, #> #   latest_pass_validator <chr>, latest_pass_validated_at <chr>, #> #   has_latest_pass <lgl>, is_current_pass <lgl>, attestation_verified <lgl>, #> #   registry_generated_at <chr> glc_search_packages(packages = packages, has_pass = TRUE) #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> <GLC registry> #> Generated: 2026-07-17T09:19:59.070332+00:00  #> # A tibble: 1 × 17 #>   id           repository branch repository_status current_status current_commit #>   <chr>        <chr>      <chr>  <chr>             <chr>          <chr>          #> 1 guidolin-gl… tscnlab/g… main   active            pass           8ec9034a3d967… #> # ℹ 11 more variables: current_validator <chr>, current_validated_at <chr>, #> #   current_errors <int>, current_warnings <int>, latest_pass_commit <chr>, #> #   latest_pass_validator <chr>, latest_pass_validated_at <chr>, #> # title: Get started with glcdp
text: Registered packages open latest passing commit default. returned handle records repository, exact commit, schema version, whether revision verified registry. function opens local package directory datapackage.json file:
code: guidolin <- glc_open("tscnlab/guidolin-glee-datasetv2") guidolin #> <GLC data package> #> Source: tscnlab/guidolin-glee-datasetv2@8ec9034a3d96 #> Schema: 2.0.0 #> Registry revision: verified local_package <- glc_open("path/to/data-package")

title: Get started with glcdp
text: compact summary useful first look: inventories make data selection explicit. List datasets, narrow file variable inventories dataset intend read. Use glc_metadata() structured metadata glc_search_metadata() need locate value without knowing resource field advance.
code: glc_summary(guidolin) #> <GLC package summary> #> Schema: 2.0.0 #> Studies: 1 | Datasets: 2 | Participants: 3 #> File groups: 2 | Files: 2 | Variables: 35 glc_datasets(guidolin) #> # A tibble: 2 × 13 #>   dataset_id schema_version study_id participant_id participant_associated #>   <chr>      <chr>          <chr>    <chr>          <lgl>                  #> 1 DS001      2.0.0          CG2024   201            TRUE                   #> 2 DS002      2.0.0          CG2024   P001           TRUE                   #> # ℹ 8 more variables: timezone <chr>, latitude <dbl>, longitude <dbl>, #> #   file_group_count <int>, file_count <int>, modalities <list>, #> #   device_ids <list>, primary_variables <list> glc_files(guidolin, dataset_id = "DS001") #> # A tibble: 1 × 19 #>   dataset_id file_group file_group_id participant_id study_id path               #>   <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr>          <chr>    <chr>              #> 1 DS001               1 DS001:1       201            CG2024   data/datasets/201… #> # ℹ 13 more variables: declared_path <chr>, format <chr>, encoding <chr>, #> #   timezone <chr>, role <chr>, data_state <chr>, modalities <list>, #> #   device_id <chr>, storage <chr>, expected_bytes <dbl>, lfs_oid <chr>, #> #   blob_sha <chr>, available <lgl> glc_variables(guidolin, dataset_id = "DS001", primary = TRUE) #> # A tibble: 1 × 13 #>   dataset_id file_group file_group_id name  label    unit  type  term  term_name #>   <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr> <chr>    <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>     #> 1 DS001               1 DS001:1       LIGHT Photopi… lx    guess phot… NA        #> # ℹ 4 more variables: calibration <chr>, primary <lgl>, factor_values <list>, #> #   factor_labels <list> metadata <- glc_metadata(guidolin, resources = c("study", "participants")) metadata$study #> # A tibble: 1 × 14 #>   study_internal_id study_title study_ethics study_short_descript…¹ study_sample #>   <chr>             <chr>       <chr>        <chr>                  <chr>        #> 1 CG2024            Near-corne… Ethics Comm… In this study, we mea… Participant… #> # ℹ abbreviated name: ¹​study_short_description #> # ℹ 9 more variables: study_groups <list>, study_setting <chr>, #> #   study_geographical_location <chr>, study_datasets <list>, study_type <chr>, #> #   study_funding_sources <list>, study_keywords <list>, #> #   study_contributors <list>, schema_version <chr> metadata$participants #> # A tibble: 3 × 4 #>   participant_internal_id participant_age participant_sex participant_gender #>   <chr>                             <int> <chr>           <chr>              #> 1 201                                  29 male            ""                 #> 2 P001                                 34 female          ""                 #> 3 P003                                 22 other           NA  glc_search_metadata(guidolin, "light", resources = "study") #> # A tibble: 3 × 5 #>   resource record field                   value                          context #>   <chr>     <int> <chr>                   <chr>                          <chr>   #> 1 study         1 study_title             Near-corneal plane light expo… record… #> 2 study         1 study_short_description In this study, we measured li… record… #> 3 study         1 study_keywords          longitundinal light logging    record… glc_search_metadata(guidolin, "light", resources = "datasets") #> # A tibble: 17 × 5 #>    resource record field                                           value context #>    <chr>     <int> <chr>                                           <chr> <chr>   #>  1 datasets      1 dataset_instructions                            Wear… record… #>  2 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… LIGHT record… #>  3 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… AMB … record… #>  4 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… AMB … record… #>  5 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… RED … record… #>  6 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… RED … record… #>  7 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… GREE… record… #>  8 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… GREE… record… #>  9 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… BLUE… record… #> 10 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… BLUE… record… #> 11 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… IR L… record… #> 12 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… IR L… record… #> 13 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… UVA … record… #> 14 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… UVA … record… #> 15 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… UVB … record… #> 16 datasets      1 dataset_file.dataset_file_variables.dataset_fi… UVB … record… #> 17 datasets      1 dataset_file.primary_variables                  LIGHT record…

title: Get started with glcdp
text: glc_read() follows package metadata chooses headers, column types, factor levels, datetime formats, decimal marks, encodings, time zones. dataset selection required large package imported accidentally. interactive sessions, glc_read() displays progress across selected files. Set progress = FALSE suppress indicator, example script manages progress reporting. result one row per compatible file group stores imported table data list-column. Inspect process groups separately roles, modalities, schemas differ. quick exploration, limit number rows read file:
code: collection <- glc_read(   guidolin,   dataset_id = "DS001",   primary_only = TRUE ) collection #> <GLC data collection> #> File groups: 1 #> Rows: 60043 #> # A tibble: 1 × 17 #>   dataset_id file_group file_group_id study_id participant_id device_id #>   <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr>    <chr>          <chr>     #> 1 DS001               1 DS001:1       CG2024   201            D001      #> # ℹ 11 more variables: modalities <list>, role <chr>, data_state <chr>, #> #   timezone <chr>, datetime_source <chr>, datetime_date <chr>, #> #   datetime_format <chr>, datetime_time <chr>, datetime_time_format <chr>, #> #   primary_variables <list>, files <list> collection$data[[1]] #> # A tibble: 60,043 × 6 #>    LIGHT .glc_dataset_id .glc_file_group .glc_participant_id .glc_source_file    #>    <dbl> <chr>           <chr>           <chr>               <chr>               #>  1  809. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  2  806. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  3  738. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  4  736. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  5  716. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  6  736. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  7  753. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  8  719. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  9  713. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #> 10  771. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #> # ℹ 60,033 more rows #> # ℹ 1 more variable: .glc_datetime <dttm> sample <- glc_read(   guidolin,   dataset_id = "DS001",   variables = "LIGHT",   n_max = 100 )

title: Get started with glcdp
text: glc_collect() checks selected groups compatible columns, types, time zones, modalities, roles, data states, datetime specifications combining . default output maps dataset id Id, participant id participant_Id, adds Datetime file.name. Internal .glc_* provenance columns removed analysis-ready result, matching core conventions described LightLogR’s import documentation. result can passed directly LightLogR. Continue guides visualizing light logger data calculating light exposure metrics. Use standardize = "none" leave source columns .glc_* provenance columns unchanged:

title: Get started with glcdp
text: Discover inspect data packages covers registry, revision, inventory, metadata workflows. Import download data covers precise import selections, persistent downloads, reproducibility manifests.

title: Import and download data
text: Inspect datasets, file groups, variables first. avoids transferring unneeded data gives stable ids source names used read selectors. dataset_id required glc_read(). Use dataset_id = "" deliberately want every dataset. Interactive calls show progress across selected files default. Use progress = FALSE suppress indicator script application provides progress reporting. Narrow import combination file-group ids indices, file paths basenames, source variable names, semantic terms: variables terms selected, imported tables contain matching source variables. glcdp still uses required date time columns internally construct .glc_datetime, retain unless filters select . Set primary_only = TRUE select declared primary variables.
code: glc_datasets(x) #> # A tibble: 2 × 13 #>   dataset_id schema_version study_id participant_id participant_associated #>   <chr>      <chr>          <chr>    <chr>          <lgl>                  #> 1 DS001      2.0.0          CG2024   201            TRUE                   #> 2 DS002      2.0.0          CG2024   P001           TRUE                   #> # ℹ 8 more variables: timezone <chr>, latitude <dbl>, longitude <dbl>, #> #   file_group_count <int>, file_count <int>, modalities <list>, #> #   device_ids <list>, primary_variables <list> glc_files(x, dataset_id = "DS001") #> # A tibble: 1 × 19 #>   dataset_id file_group file_group_id participant_id study_id path               #>   <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr>          <chr>    <chr>              #> 1 DS001               1 DS001:1       201            CG2024   data/datasets/201… #> # ℹ 13 more variables: declared_path <chr>, format <chr>, encoding <chr>, #> #   timezone <chr>, role <chr>, data_state <chr>, modalities <list>, #> #   device_id <chr>, storage <chr>, expected_bytes <dbl>, lfs_oid <chr>, #> #   blob_sha <chr>, available <lgl> glc_variables(x, dataset_id = "DS001") #> # A tibble: 33 × 13 #>    dataset_id file_group file_group_id name    label unit  type  term  term_name #>    <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr>   <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>     #>  1 DS001               1 DS001:1       DATE/T… Time… N/A   guess other DATE/TIME #>  2 DS001               1 DS001:1       MS      Unkn… Unkn… guess other MS        #>  3 DS001               1 DS001:1       EVENT   Occu… 0 or… guess other EVENT     #>  4 DS001               1 DS001:1       TEMPER… Skin… °C    guess other TEMPERAT… #>  5 DS001               1 DS001:1       EXT TE… envi… °C    guess other EXT. TEM… #>  6 DS001               1 DS001:1       ORIENT… Unkn… Unkn… guess other ORIENTAT… #>  7 DS001               1 DS001:1       PIM     Acce… Unkn… guess other PIM       #>  8 DS001               1 DS001:1       TAT     Acce… Unkn… guess other TAT       #>  9 DS001               1 DS001:1       ZCM     Acce… Unkn… guess other ZCM       #> 10 DS001               1 DS001:1       PIMn    Norm… Unkn… guess other PIMn      #> # ℹ 23 more rows #> # ℹ 4 more variables: calibration <chr>, primary <lgl>, factor_values <list>, #> #   factor_labels <list> collection <- glc_read(x, dataset_id = "DS001") collection #> <GLC data collection> #> File groups: 1 #> Rows: 60043 #> # A tibble: 1 × 17 #>   dataset_id file_group file_group_id study_id participant_id device_id #>   <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr>    <chr>          <chr>     #> 1 DS001               1 DS001:1       CG2024   201            D001      #> # ℹ 11 more variables: modalities <list>, role <chr>, data_state <chr>, #> #   timezone <chr>, datetime_source <chr>, datetime_date <chr>, #> #   datetime_format <chr>, datetime_time <chr>, datetime_time_format <chr>, #> #   primary_variables <list>, files <list> file_inventory <- glc_files(x, dataset_id = "DS001") first_file <- file_inventory[1, ] first_file #> # A tibble: 1 × 19 #>   dataset_id file_group file_group_id participant_id study_id path               #>   <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr>          <chr>    <chr>              #> 1 DS001               1 DS001:1       201            CG2024   data/datasets/201… #> # ℹ 13 more variables: declared_path <chr>, format <chr>, encoding <chr>, #> #   timezone <chr>, role <chr>, data_state <chr>, modalities <list>, #> #   device_id <chr>, storage <chr>, expected_bytes <dbl>, lfs_oid <chr>, #> #   blob_sha <chr>, available <lgl> file_group <- first_file$file_group_id[[1]] file_group #> [1] "DS001:1" files <- basename(first_file$path[[1]]) files #> [1] "201_actlumus_Log_1020_20230821094227441.txt"  selected <- glc_read(   x,   dataset_id = "DS001",   file_group = file_group,   files = files,   variables = c("LIGHT"),   n_max = 1000 ) selected$data #> [[1]] #> # A tibble: 1,000 × 6 #>    LIGHT .glc_dataset_id .glc_file_group .glc_participant_id .glc_source_file    #>    <dbl> <chr>           <chr>           <chr>               <chr>               #>  1  809. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  2  806. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  3  738. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  4  736. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  5  716. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  6  736. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  7  753. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  8  719. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #>  9  713. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #> 10  771. DS001           DS001:1         201                 data/datasets/201_… #> # ℹ 990 more rows #> # ℹ 1 more variable: .glc_datetime <dttm> primary <- glc_read(   x,   dataset_id = "DS001",   primary_only = TRUE )

title: Import and download data
text: glc_data_collection one row per file group. Descriptive columns record dataset, participant, device, modality, role, data state, time zone, datetime specification, source files. imported table data list-column. imported table also contains .glc_* provenance columns dataset id, participant id, source file, constructed datetime. make row origins explicit tables combined. default, metadata mismatches undeclared extra columns values parsed declared type errors. exploratory work, use problems = "warn" retain problematic data warnings; inspect result analysis.

  STATE <dbl>, CAP_SENS_1 <dbl>, CAP_SENS_2 <dbl>, F1 <dbl>, F2 <dbl>, #> #   F3 <dbl>, F4 <dbl>, F5 <dbl>, F6 <dbl>, F7 <dbl>, F8 <dbl>, #> #   `MELANOPIC EDI` <dbl>, CLEAR <dbl>, .glc_dataset_id <chr>, … exploratory <- glc_read(   x,   dataset_id = "DS001",   problems = "warn" )

title: Import and download data
text: Combine file groups structures meanings compatible: default standardize = "lightlogr" follows data conventions used LightLogR adds: Id, derived dataset id; participant_Id, derived participant id; Datetime, constructed metadata-defined datetime specification; file.name, derived source file path. standardized result contains internal .glc_* provenance columns. ordered Id Datetime grouped Id. Use standardize = "none" want ungrouped tibble whose source provenance columns left unchanged. glc_collect() refuses combine groups differ columns, types, time zones, modalities, roles, data states, datetime specifications. Keep groups separate select compatible subset glc_read(). Collected data can used directly LightLogR’s data-quality insight functions, visualization guide, metrics guide.
code: light_data <- glc_collect(collection) light_data #> # A tibble: 60,043 × 37 #> # Groups:   Id [1] #>    `DATE/TIME`    MS EVENT TEMPERATURE `EXT TEMPERATURE` ORIENTATION   PIM  PIMn #>    <chr>       <dbl> <dbl>       <dbl>             <dbl>       <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> #>  1 14/08/2023…     0     0        28.9                 0          16     0   0   #>  2 14/08/2023…     0     0        28.9                 0          16     0   0   #>  3 14/08/2023…     0     0        28.8                 0          16     6   0.6 #>  4 14/08/2023…     0     0        28.8                 0          16     0   0   #>  5 14/08/2023…     0     0        28.8                 0          16     0   0   #>  6 14/08/2023…     0     0        28.7                 0          16     0   0   #>  7 14/08/2023…     0     0        28.7                 0          16     0   0   #>  8 14/08/2023…     0     0        28.7                 0          16     0   0   #>  9 14/08/2023…     0     0        28.6                 0          16     0   0   #> 10 14/08/2023…     0     0        28.6                 0          16     0   0   #> # ℹ 60,033 more rows #> # ℹ 29 more variables: TAT <dbl>, TATn <dbl>, ZCM <dbl>, ZCMn <dbl>, #> #   LIGHT <dbl>, `AMB LIGHT` <dbl>, `RED LIGHT` <dbl>, `GREEN LIGHT` <dbl>, #> #   `BLUE LIGHT` <dbl>, `IR LIGHT` <dbl>, `UVA LIGHT` <dbl>, `UVB LIGHT` <dbl>, #> #   STATE <dbl>, CAP_SENS_1 <dbl>, CAP_SENS_2 <dbl>, F1 <dbl>, F2 <dbl>, #> #   F3 <dbl>, F4 <dbl>, F5 <dbl>, F6 <dbl>, F7 <dbl>, F8 <dbl>, #> #   `MELANOPIC EDI` <dbl>, CLEAR <dbl>, Id <fct>, participant_Id <chr>, … source_data <- glc_collect(collection, standardize = "none")

title: Import and download data
text: glc_download() creates persistent directory preserving package-relative paths. safe default downloads descriptor, core metadata, required schemas: public packages, ordinary Git files transferred immutable raw URLs selected commit, avoiding per-file GitHub API requests. token supplied glc_open() continues use authenticated API transport, including private repositories. Request data explicitly apply kinds selectors used inspection: Use include = "" intend mirror every declared resource. resources files arguments can narrow download. Existing files protected unless overwrite = TRUE set explicitly. Every download writes glcdp-manifest.json, recording source repository, exact commit, registry verification state, schema version, selection, hashes, storage types, sizes, Git LFS object ids. Reopen directory use inspection import API without fetching package : descriptor core metadata retain records declared source package. local subset, glc_summary() distinguishes locally available datasets, file groups, files declared records. package incomplete, glc_read() also reports many declared datasets files locally available, skips absent files. Thus, dataset_id = "" reads data included subset. Use glc_files(local, available = FALSE) inspect omitted file records.
code: metadata_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), "guidolin-metadata") glc_download(x, metadata_dir) #> # A tibble: 17 × 6 #>    path                                 destination storage bytes sha256 lfs_oid #>    <chr>                                <chr>       <chr>   <dbl> <chr>  <chr>   #>  1 datapackage.json                     /tmp/RtmpF… git      2363 e841f… NA      #>  2 data/study.json                      /tmp/RtmpF… git      3644 fb165… NA      #>  3 data/participants.json               /tmp/RtmpF… git       379 1a7ae… NA      #>  4 data/participant_characteristics.csv /tmp/RtmpF… git       218 554b8… NA      #>  5 data/datasets.json                   /tmp/RtmpF… git     17835 4df6d… NA      #>  6 data/devices.json                    /tmp/RtmpF… git      2148 53076… NA      #>  7 data/datasheets/device_datasheet.js… /tmp/RtmpF… git      1343 50acf… NA      #>  8 data/datasheets/sensor_datasheet.js… /tmp/RtmpF… git      1213 0185f… NA      #>  9 schemas/2.0.0/gleam-dp-profile.json  /tmp/RtmpF… git     12715 755e1… NA      #> 10 schemas/json-entity-resource.json    /tmp/RtmpF… git       743 a6442… NA      #> 11 schemas/2.0.0/study.schema.json      /tmp/RtmpF… git      4361 861e8… NA      #> 12 schemas/2.0.0/participants.schema.j… /tmp/RtmpF… git       932 135aa… NA      #> 13 schemas/2.0.0/participant_character… /tmp/RtmpF… git      1244 b3b53… NA      #> 14 schemas/2.0.0/dataset.schema.json    /tmp/RtmpF… git     12431 6d1ef… NA      #> 15 schemas/2.0.0/device.schema.json     /tmp/RtmpF… git      3193 c5efc… NA      #> 16 schemas/2.0.0/device_datasheet.sche… /tmp/RtmpF… git      5499 358e3… NA      #> 17 schemas/light_data.schema.json       /tmp/RtmpF… git      1653 ce2f6… NA data_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), "guidolin-ds001") downloads <- glc_download(   x,   data_dir,   include = "data",   dataset_id = "DS001" ) downloads #> # A tibble: 18 × 6 #>    path                                destination storage  bytes sha256 lfs_oid #>    <chr>                               <chr>       <chr>    <dbl> <chr>  <chr>   #>  1 datapackage.json                    /tmp/RtmpF… git     2.36e3 e841f… NA      #>  2 data/study.json                     /tmp/RtmpF… git     3.64e3 fb165… NA      #>  3 data/participants.json              /tmp/RtmpF… git     3.79e2 1a7ae… NA      #>  4 data/participant_characteristics.c… /tmp/RtmpF… git     2.18e2 554b8… NA      #>  5 data/datasets.json                  /tmp/RtmpF… git     1.78e4 4df6d… NA      #>  6 data/devices.json                   /tmp/RtmpF… git     2.15e3 53076… NA      #>  7 data/datasheets/device_datasheet.j… /tmp/RtmpF… git     1.34e3 50acf… NA      #>  8 data/datasheets/sensor_datasheet.j… /tmp/RtmpF… git     1.21e3 0185f… NA      #>  9 schemas/2.0.0/gleam-dp-profile.json /tmp/RtmpF… git     1.27e4 755e1… NA      #> 10 schemas/json-entity-resource.json   /tmp/RtmpF… git     7.43e2 a6442… NA      #> 11 schemas/2.0.0/study.schema.json     /tmp/RtmpF… git     4.36e3 861e8… NA      #> 12 schemas/2.0.0/participants.schema.… /tmp/RtmpF… git     9.32e2 135aa… NA      #> 13 schemas/2.0.0/participant_characte… /tmp/RtmpF… git     1.24e3 b3b53… NA      #> 14 schemas/2.0.0/dataset.schema.json   /tmp/RtmpF… git     1.24e4 6d1ef… NA      #> 15 schemas/2.0.0/device.schema.json    /tmp/RtmpF… git     3.19e3 c5efc… NA      #> 16 schemas/2.0.0/device_datasheet.sch… /tmp/RtmpF… git     5.50e3 358e3… NA      #> 17 schemas/light_data.schema.json      /tmp/RtmpF… git     1.65e3 ce2f6… NA      #> 18 data/datasets/201_actlumus_Log_102… /tmp/RtmpF… git     1.03e7 6893b… NA local <- glc_open(data_dir) glc_summary(local) #> <GLC package summary> #> Schema: 2.0.0 #> Studies: 1 | Datasets: 1 available / 2 declared | Participants: 3 #> File groups: 1 available / 2 declared | Files: 1 available / 2 declared | Variables: 35 glc_files(local, available = FALSE) #> # A tibble: 1 × 19 #>   dataset_id file_group file_group_id participant_id study_id path               #>   <chr>           <int> <chr>         <chr>          <chr>    <chr>              #> 1 DS002               1 DS002:1       P001           CG2024   data/datasets/p00… #> # ℹ 13 more variables: declared_path <chr>, format <chr>, encoding <chr>, #> #   timezone <chr>, role <chr>, data_state <chr>, modalities <list>, #> #   device_id <chr>, storage <chr>, expected_bytes <dbl>, lfs_oid <chr>, #> #   blob_sha <chr>, available <lgl>  local_collection <- glc_read(local, dataset_id = "all") #> Local package is a partial data subset. #> ℹ 1 of 2 declared datasets and 1 of 2 declared files are locally available. #> ℹ Unavailable dataset: DS002. #> ℹ glc_read() will read only locally available files. local_data <- glc_collect(local_collection)

title: Import and download data
text: Remote glc_read() calls use session-temporary storage default. good fit one-analysis leaves persistent files behind. Pass cache_dir glc_open() want remote files reused across calls, use glc_download() want explicit, portable package subset manifest: Choose cache performance; choose downloaded subset durable, inspectable analysis input.
code: cached <- glc_open(   "tscnlab/guidolin-glee-datasetv2",   cache_dir = file.path(tempdir(), "glcdp-cache") )

what: Discover, Access, and Import Global Light Commons Data Packages
title: Discover, Access, and Import Global Light Commons Data Packages
text: glcdp discovers, inspects, downloads, imports Global Light Commons data packages. designed infrastructure packages LightLogR LightLogWeb remaining independent analysis interfaces.

title: Discover, Access, and Import Global Light Commons Data Packages
text: Install development version GitHub: development version supports stable GLC metadata schemas 1.0.0 2.0.0, experimental reading 3.0.0 development schema, immutable registry revisions, selective downloads, GitHub-hosted Git LFS objects. Remote reads use temporary session storage unless cache directory explicitly supplied. Persistent downloads made glc_download() explicit cache directory.
code: # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("tscnlab/glc-dp-r") packages <- glcdp::glc_packages() guidolin <- glcdp::glc_open("tscnlab/guidolin-glee-datasetv2")  glcdp::glc_summary(guidolin) glcdp::glc_variables(guidolin, primary = TRUE)  collection <- glcdp::glc_read(guidolin, dataset_id = "DS001") light_data <- glcdp::glc_collect(collection)

title: Discover, Access, and Import Global Light Commons Data Packages
text: package website includes complete function reference workflow articles: Get started glcdp Discover inspect data packages Import download data LightLogR-standardized data returned glc_collect() use dataset id Id, retain participant id participant_Id, provide Datetime file.name, omit internal .glc_* provenance columns. result follows conventions used LightLogR’s analysis visualization functions.

title: Collect compatible file groups — glc_collect
text: Explicitly combines file-group tibbles checking columns, types, time zones, modalities, roles, data states.

title: Collect compatible file groups — glc_collect
code: glc_collect(x, standardize = c("lightlogr", "none"))

title: Collect compatible file groups — glc_collect
text: x collection returned glc_read(). standardize Either "lightlogr" add conventional Id, participant_Id, Datetime, file.name columns remove internal .glc_* provenance columns, "none" retain source provenance columns unchanged.

title: Collect compatible file groups — glc_collect
text: combined tibble. LightLogR-standardized output, Id contains dataset id, participant_Id contains participant id, result grouped Id.

title: Inventory datasets — glc_datasets
text: Inventory datasets

title: Inventory datasets — glc_datasets
code: glc_datasets(x, dataset_id = NULL)

title: Inventory datasets — glc_datasets
text: x package opened glc_open(). dataset_id Optional dataset id ids.

title: Inventory datasets — glc_datasets
text: tibble one row per dataset.

what: Download package metadata or data — glc_download
title: Download package metadata or data — glc_download
text: Downloads descriptor-declared dataset-referenced content, preserves repository-relative paths, writes reproducibility manifest.

title: Download package metadata or data — glc_download
code: glc_download(   x,   dest_dir,   include = c("metadata", "data", "all"),   dataset_id = NULL,   file_group = NULL,   resources = NULL,   files = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE )

title: Download package metadata or data — glc_download
text: x package opened glc_open(). dest_dir Destination directory. include One "metadata", "data", "". Metadata safe default. dataset_id Optional dataset id selection data downloads. file_group Optional file-group selection. resources Optional descriptor resource names. files Optional exact paths, declared paths, basenames. overwrite Whether existing files may replaced.

title: Download package metadata or data — glc_download
text: tibble recording downloaded paths, storage, size, hashes.

title: Inventory declared data files — glc_files
text: Inventory declared data files

title: Inventory declared data files — glc_files
code: glc_files(   x,   dataset_id = NULL,   file_group = NULL,   role = NULL,   modality = NULL,   available = NULL )

title: Inventory declared data files — glc_files
text: x package opened glc_open(). dataset_id Optional dataset id ids. file_group Optional group index stable dataset:group id. role Optional file-group role. modality Optional modality. available Optional logical filter file availability.

title: Inventory declared data files — glc_files
text: tibble one row per concrete declared file.

title: Load metadata resources — glc_metadata
text: Loads core metadata default. Additional descriptor resources can requested explicitly name.

title: Load metadata resources — glc_metadata
code: glc_metadata(x, resources = NULL)

title: Load metadata resources — glc_metadata
text: x package opened glc_open(). resources Optional resource names. default selects declared core metadata resources.

title: Load metadata resources — glc_metadata
text: named list one element per requested resource. Tabular resources returned tibbles; directory resources contain named sub-lists.

what: Open a Global Light Commons data package — glc_open
title: Open a Global Light Commons data package — glc_open
text: Opens local package resolves GitHub-hosted package immutable commit. Registered packages default latest passing revision.

title: Open a Global Light Commons data package — glc_open
code: glc_open(   source,   ref = "latest_pass",   token = NULL,   cache_dir = NULL,   registry = NULL,   quiet = FALSE )

title: Open a Global Light Commons data package — glc_open
text: source Registry id, owner/repository, GitHub URL, local package directory, local datapackage.json path. ref Remote revision: "latest_pass", "current", exact 40-character commit SHA. token Optional GitHub token. omitted, GITHUB_PAT GITHUB_TOKEN consulted. cache_dir Optional explicit persistent cache directory. default uses session-temporary storage remote reads. registry Optional registry object, URL, local JSON path. quiet Suppress informational messages. Warnings remain visible.

title: Open a Global Light Commons data package — glc_open
text: glc_package handle.

title: Open a Global Light Commons data package — glc_open
code: if (FALSE) { # interactive() package <- glc_open("tscnlab/guidolin-glee-datasetv2") package }

what: List registered Global Light Commons data packages — glc_packages
title: List registered Global Light Commons data packages — glc_packages
text: Downloads flattens Global Light Commons registry. passing non-passing current revisions retained.

title: List registered Global Light Commons data packages — glc_packages
code: glc_packages(registry = glc_default_registry(), refresh = FALSE)

title: List registered Global Light Commons data packages — glc_packages
text: registry Registry JSON URL path. Defaults official registry value option glcdp.registry_url. refresh Whether bypass -session registry cache.

title: List registered Global Light Commons data packages — glc_packages
text: glc_registry tibble one row per registered repository.

title: List registered Global Light Commons data packages — glc_packages
code: if (FALSE) { # interactive() packages <- glc_packages() glc_search_packages("guidolin", packages) }

title: Read metadata-described dataset files — glc_read

title: Read metadata-described dataset files — glc_read
code: glc_read(   x,   dataset_id,   file_group = NULL,   files = NULL,   variables = NULL,   terms = NULL,   primary_only = FALSE,   n_max = Inf,   problems = c("error", "warn"),   progress = interactive() )

title: Read metadata-described dataset files — glc_read
text: x package opened glc_open(). dataset_id Dataset id ids. Use "" explicitly read every dataset. file_group Optional group index stable id. files Optional declared paths, resolved paths, basenames. variables Optional source variable names. terms Optional semantic variable terms. primary_only Select declared primary variables. n_max Maximum rows read file. problems Whether metadata mismatches errors warnings. progress Show progress files imported. Defaults TRUE interactive sessions FALSE otherwise.

title: Read metadata-described dataset files — glc_read
text: glc_data_collection tibble one data list-column per file group.

title: Read metadata-described dataset files — glc_read
text: variable filters used, source columns required construct datetimes used internally omitted unless selected filters. Declared files absent local package subset skipped. local package contains fewer datasets files declared, glc_read() reports discrepancy reads available files.

code: glc_schema_versions() #> # A tibble: 3 × 3 #>   version status       notes                                               #>   <chr>   <chr>        <chr>                                               #> 1 1.0.0   stable       Legacy packages may omit the root schema version.   #> 2 2.0.0   stable       Current released schema supported by the validator. #> 3 3.0.0   experimental Follows the schema-3.0.0-development branch.

title: Search metadata values or field paths — glc_search_metadata
code: glc_search_metadata(   x,   query,   resources = NULL,   fields = NULL,   fixed = TRUE,   ignore_case = TRUE,   search_in = c("values", "fields", "both") )

title: Search metadata values or field paths — glc_search_metadata
text: x package opened glc_open(). query Text regular expression search . resources Optional metadata resource names. fields Optional exact field names complete field paths include. fixed Treat query fixed text rather regular expression. ignore_case Ignore letter case matching. search_in match query: scalar metadata "values", complete field paths "fields", "". default "values".

title: Search metadata values or field paths — glc_search_metadata
text: tibble matching scalar metadata values field paths.

title: Search metadata values or field paths — glc_search_metadata
text: Field searches return leaf-level rows value searches. field path contains multiple scalar values therefore produces one row per value. fields argument can combined search_in mode restrict field paths searched.

what: glcdp: Global Light Commons data-package helpers — glcdp-package
title: glcdp: Global Light Commons data-package helpers — glcdp-package
text: glcdp discovers, inspects, downloads, imports Global Light Commons data packages. Remote packages resolved immutable commits, data imported metadata-described file groups.

title: glcdp: Global Light Commons data-package helpers — glcdp-package
text: Maintainer: Johannes Zauner johannes.zauner@tum.de (ORCID) Authors: Salma M. Thalji salma.thalji@tum.de (ORCID) Manuel Spitschan manuel.spitschan@tum.de (ORCID)

title: glcdp 0.90.0
text: Initial package implementation registry discovery, metadata inspection, selective downloads, Git LFS retrieval, metadata-driven data import. Added pkgdown website workflow vignettes covering discovery, metadata inspection, selective import, collection, reproducible downloads. glc_read() now reports file-level progress default interactive sessions; set progress = FALSE suppress . Filtered glc_read() calls now use datetime source columns internally without retaining unless filters explicitly select . LightLogR-standardized glc_collect() output now maps dataset ids Id, participant ids participant_Id, removes internal .glc_* columns. Fixed remote loading small Git blobs metadata searches nested data-frame fields, resolving metadata examples vignettes. glc_search_metadata() can now search metadata values, field paths, new search_in argument. Unauthenticated ordinary Git file transfers now use immutable raw-content URLs, preventing per-file GitHub API rate limits reads downloads. Summaries local subsets now distinguish available declared datasets, file groups, files; glc_read(dataset_id = "") skips files intentionally absent local subset reports discrepancy.
